hero.headline: When your septic *needs answers*, we dig deep
hero.subheadline: Licensed inspector answering calls, not voicemail. Real-time insights for buyers, sellers, and worried homeowners.

services_section.label: THE DIG
services_section.heading: Complete Septic Solutions
services_section.subheading: From inspection to installation, we handle what's underground

services.title: Septic Inspections
services.description: Thorough system evaluation for home sales, purchases, or troubleshooting. Real-time insights and clear reports.

services.title: Emergency Repairs
services.description: Backups, clogs, and system failures handled fast. We show up when your septic system quits.

services.title: System Installation
services.description: Complete septic system design and installation using top-grade materials. Passes inspection every time.

services.title: Maintenance Services
services.description: Pumping, cleaning, and preventive care to keep your system running smooth for years.

about.heading: Earthworm Septic Services
about.body: New Haven's septic team that picks up the phone and shows up when promised. Real people, real trucks, real solutions.

reviews.name: Jenn K.
reviews.text: From start to finish, the scheduling and service level was impressive. Dave worked with integrity, providing excellent guidance and connecting us with colleagues who could help.

reviews.name: Jesselyn G.
reviews.text: Even with a full schedule Dave got out to help me quickly. He was prompt and professional. I felt like I was talking to a friend.

reviews.name: Susan M.
reviews.text: David picked up on the second ring and came that same day. He immediately put our minds at ease. Professional and extremely knowledgeable.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving New Haven & Beyond
service_areas.subheading: Local septic experts covering the greater New Haven area

cta.heading: Ready for straight answers about your septic?
cta.body: No runaround, no surprises. Just honest inspection and reliable service from New Haven's septic specialists.
